mapper.select: SELECT employee.name AS employee_name, employee.employee_id, laptop.laptop_id, laptop.os_version, laptop.need_to_update, laptop.laptop_year, laptop.to_renew, laptop.in_use, laptop.employee_id, laptop.created_at, laptop.updated_at FROM Laptop LEFT JOIN Employee ON employee.employee_id = laptop.employee_id WHERE laptop_id = #{laptopId}

SELECT employee.name AS employee_name, employee.employee_id, laptop.laptop_id, laptop.os_version, laptop.need_to_update, laptop.laptop_year, laptop.to_renew, laptop.in_use, laptop.employee_id, laptop.created_at, laptop.updated_at FROM Laptop LEFT JOIN Employee ON employee.employee_id = laptop.employee_id

SELECT employee.name AS employee_name, employee.employee_id, laptop.laptop_id, laptop.os_version, laptop.need_to_update, laptop.laptop_year, laptop.to_renew, laptop.in_use, laptop.employee_id, laptop.created_at, laptop.updated_at FROM Laptop LEFT JOIN Employee ON employee.employee_id = laptop.employee_id WHERE laptop.need_to_update = TRUE

SELECT employee.name AS employee_name, employee.employee_id, laptop.laptop_id, laptop.os_version, laptop.need_to_update, laptop.laptop_year, laptop.to_renew, laptop.in_use, laptop.employee_id, laptop.created_at, laptop.updated_at FROM Laptop LEFT JOIN Employee ON employee.employee_id = laptop.employee_id WHERE laptop.in_use = TRUE

SELECT employee.name AS employee_name, employee.employee_id, laptop.laptop_id, laptop.os_version, laptop.need_to_update, laptop.laptop_year, laptop.to_renew, laptop.in_use, laptop.employee_id, laptop.created_at, laptop.updated_at FROM Laptop LEFT JOIN Employee ON employee.employee_id = laptop.employee_id WHERE laptop.to_renew = True
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO laptop (os_version, need_to_update, laptop_year, to_renew, in_use, employee_id, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{osVersion}, #{needToUpdate}, #{laptopYear}, #{toRenew}, #{inUse}, #{employeeId}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE laptop SET os_version = #{osVersion}, need_to_update = #{needToUpdate}, laptop_year = #{laptopYear}, to_renew = #{toRenew}, in_use = #{inUse}, employee_id = #{employeeId}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE laptop_id = #{laptopId}
